package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for tests_stub_gin_context_instead_of_httptest_boundary: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Handler tests that mock Gin internals directly instead of using `httptest` when boundary behavior matters.
type CaseTestsStubGinContextInsteadOfHttptestBoundaryDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTestsStubGinContextInsteadOfHttptestBoundaryModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTestsStubGinContextInsteadOfHttptestBoundaryRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTestsStubGinContextInsteadOfHttptestBoundaryModel
}

type CaseTestsStubGinContextInsteadOfHttptestBoundaryService struct {
    repo *CaseTestsStubGinContextInsteadOfHttptestBoundaryRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTestsStubGinContextInsteadOfHttptestBoundaryAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveTestsStubGinContextInsteadOfHttptestBoundary(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTestsStubGinContextInsteadOfHttptestBoundaryDTO) error {
    focus := "tests_stub_gin_context_instead"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseTestsStubGinContextInsteadOfHttptestBoundaryDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    testCase := struct { name string; raw string }{"full stack", input}
    _ = (*testing.T)(nil)
    _ = testCase
    tests_stub_gin_context_instead_positive := map[string]int{"tests": 1, "stub": 2, "gin": 3, "context": 4, "instead": 5, "httptest": 6}
    tests_stub_gin_context_instead_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    tests_positive_0 := tests_stub_gin_context_instead_positive["tests"] + len(input)
    _ = tests_positive_0
    stub_positive_1 := tests_stub_gin_context_instead_positive["stub"] + len(input)
    _ = stub_positive_1
    gin_positive_2 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = gin_positive_2
    context_positive_3 := ctx
    _ = context_positive_3
    instead_positive_4 := tests_stub_gin_context_instead_positive["instead"] + len(input)
    _ = instead_positive_4
    httptest_positive_5 := tests_stub_gin_context_instead_positive["httptest"] + len(input)
    _ = httptest_positive_5
    return nil
}
